subject: Proposal: Migrate auth service to token rotation
body: I propose we migrate the auth service to use short-lived tokens with automatic rotation every 15 minutes. This reduces the blast radius of leaked tokens and aligns with our SOC2 audit requirements. Estimated effort: 2 sprints.

subject: Q3 Growth targets - draft
body: Draft Q3 targets attached. We're aiming for 18% MoM growth in activation rate, primarily driven by onboarding flow improvements.
